name: Fanta - Goat cheerleader -
description:
Artist: Oro97

A femboy?!

Los femboys son lo mejor! El que diga lo contrario es un pendejo 🗣🗣🗣

This bot has been mainly made for AceyWacy and maybe I'll make more femboys, but it remains to be seen if this bot does well

This is my first Femboy so I might have some problems. And yes... I called it Fanta, like the drink... but in this chat the drink is not called Fanta, but 'fanto', to avoid problems, especially

Fanta is a goat... rabbit? I really don't know, I only put goat because I saw it more as a goat and I really don't know why I saw it as a rabbit, but it doesn't matter. He's a cheerleader and he really doesn't like gender stereotypes.

And what do you think of Tera? Do you like it or should I send it two meters under? (Two meters would be roughly 6 feet 5 inches, so you understand, lol)

Que?
creator: Teatera.
